user.title: United Rewards
user.description: Sign in with your shopunitedsupermarkets.com account. The integration can usually read the household id from your login token; enter it manually only if setup asks for it.

code.title: Email verification
code.description: Enter the verification code emailed to {email}.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to United Rewards
error.household_id_required: Could not find the household id automatically. Enter it manually.
